metadata.title: Tressel Sync for Obsidian
metadata.description: Tressel Sync for Obsidian Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: error
ast.target: 从 Tressel 同步时出错 -

ast.name: info
ast.target: 创建 Tressel 同步文件夹时出错 -

ast.name: info
ast.source: Loading Tressel Sync for Obsidian plugin
ast.target: 正在加载 Tressel Sync for Obsidian 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get your unique access token from the Obsidian/Access Token page in Tressel's integration settings
ast.target: 请从 Tressel 集成设置中的 Obsidian/Access Token 页面获取您的唯一访问令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Press this if you want to re-sync all your highlights from scratch (including ones already synced)
ast.target: 如果您想从头开始重新同步所有高亮内容（包括已同步的内容），请按此按钮

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the folder you'd like your Tressel highlights to be stored in. If it doesn't exist, Tressel will automatically create it
ast.target: 选择您希望存储 Tressel 高亮内容的文件夹。如果该文件夹不存在，Tressel 将自动创建它

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sync into separate folders based on type. For example, Twitter threads will be saved to /Twitter/Tweet Collections. Leave this off if you want a flat file structure.
ast.target: 根据类型同步到单独的文件夹。例如，Twitter 线程将保存到 /Twitter/Tweet Collections。如果您想要扁平的文件结构，请关闭此选项。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to sync from Tressel - Invalid Token provided
ast.target: 无法从 Tressel 同步 - 提供的令牌无效

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error while syncing from Tressel - check the console for logs
ast.target: 从 Tressel 同步时出错 - 请检查控制台日志

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to sync from Tressel - please fill out your Tressel user token before syncing
ast.target: 无法从 Tressel 同步 - 请在同步前填写您的 Tressel 用户令牌

ast.name: text
ast.source: Invalid token - please enter the right token to sync your highlights from Tressel. You can find your Tressel access token in the Tressel integration settings page
ast.target: 令牌无效 - 请输入正确的令牌以从 Tressel 同步您的高亮内容。您可以在 Tressel 集成设置页面找到您的 Tressel 访问令牌
